title: autobench.judge.dissent_weight v1
description: Dissent-weighted AHE confirmation score per iteration. Emitted by PopulationRunner after each RSI iteration to surface how the contested_score_multiplier derived from judge-pool dissent affects the verified-AHE outcome. Cases with dissent_ratio > 0.4 are downweighted by (1 - dissent_ratio) so disputed cases count less toward confirming the prediction. Source: /autobench.

iteration.description: RSI iteration number this weight applies to

mean_dissent_ratio.description: Mean dissent_ratio across all cases in this iteration (0.0 when pool disabled)

total_case_count.description: Total number of cases evaluated in this iteration

contested_score_multiplier.description: Downweight applied to verified-AHE score for this iteration. Computed as max(0.0, 1.0 - mean_dissent_ratio) when mean_dissent_ratio > 0.4, else 1.0

outcome_label.description: AHE verification outcome label for this iteration
